problem_statement: ReadOnlyWorkerEffectReconciliationWitness defines the effect reconciliation evidence boundary, but receipt append still needs a schema-backed witness before any runtime worker dispatch can be enabled.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerReceiptAppendWitness validates against a JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the witness binds the upstream effect reconciliation witness, runtime receipt emission admission witness, and runtime receipt-store activation witness
the witness requires append-only store proof, idempotency proof, receipt digest, trusted runtime clock evidence, WorkerFailureReceipt obligation on error, and receipt append before terminal closure
the witness keeps receipt append, runtime dispatch admission, runtime dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, filesystem writes, connector calls, success claims, and terminal closure denied
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing authorization input refs, admission drift, malformed payloads, and summary drift
non_goals: do not perform UAO dispatch authorization
do not emit or append runtime receipts
do not grant filesystem, connector, network, terminal closure, or success-claim authority
constraints: Foundation Mode remains local-first and witness-only

runtime dispatch remains blocked until effect reconciliation, runtime receipt emission admission, receipt-store activation, append-only proof, idempotency proof, receipt digest evidence, trusted runtime clock evidence, WorkerFailureReceipt, and receipt append evidence exist
all new artifacts must remain deterministic and read-only
evidence_required: upstream runtime receipt emission admission witness binding
upstream runtime receipt-store activation witness binding
